    A

    addComment(Comment) - Method in class model.Issue
    Adds a comment to this issue.
    addIssue(Issue) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Adds a new issue to the manager.
    addRole(UserRole) - Method in class model.User
     
    addTag(String) - Method in class model.Issue
    Adds a tag to the issue.
    addUser(User) - Method in class model.UserManager
    Adds new user to the database of users
    ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class model.UserRole
     
    assignee - Variable in class model.Issue
    The user currently assigned to work on this issue.
    assignee - Variable in record class model.IssueListRecord
    The field for the assignee record component.
    assignee() - Method in record class model.IssueListRecord
    Returns the value of the assignee record component.
    assignIssue(Issue, User) - Method in class model.IssueManager
    Assigns a user to a specific issue.
    assignUser(User) - Method in class model.Issue
    Assigns a user to this issue.
    AuthFilter - Class in com.example.bugtracker50
    AuthFilter is a servlet filter that intercepts requests to protected URLs such as "/edit-issue", "/new-issue", and "/user-details" to ensure that the user is authenticated before accessing these resources.
    AuthFilter() - Constructor for class com.example.bugtracker50.AuthFilter
     
    author - Variable in class model.Comment
    Author of a comment
    author - Variable in record class model.IssueListRecord
    The field for the author record component.
    author() - Method in record class model.IssueListRecord
    Returns the value of the author record component.
    authorFullName - Variable in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    The field for the authorFullName record component.
    authorFullName() - Method in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    Returns the value of the authorFullName record component.
    authorUsername - Variable in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    The field for the authorUsername record component.
    authorUsername() - Method in record class model.IssueFullRecord
    Returns the value of the authorUsername record component.
